title: Analytics - Login Success
scenario: Successful Poly account login via mobile app logs default analytics events including graph, event counts, and app metadata
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the device.
Ensure the user is not logged in (precondition).
Enter valid Poly cloud account credentials.
Tap the Sign In / Login button.
Wait for the login process to complete and the app to confirm successful login.
Open the Firebase console and navigate to the Login Success event page.

Verify that default analytics elements are displayed: graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
Check that the screen name, user type, and action are recorded.
Wait a few hours and re-check the event count to confirm it has increased.
expected: The Login Success event is logged in Firebase with all default analytics elements (graph, events in last 30 min, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment). Screen name, user type, and action are recorded. Event count increases after a few hours.
